name: skilllens-codex
description: Launch SkillLens from Codex and capture sessions for skill coverage analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Open SkillLens for Codex skill coverage.
interface.longDescription: SkillLens Codex launches the browser viewer from Codex, packages Codex session traces, loaded SKILL.md files, task metadata, and result metadata into a SkillLens capture bundle, then runs coverage analysis.
defaultPrompt: Open SkillLens for this Codex session.
